SAKURAMOD-ENABLE_SAKURA_VOICE.title: Sakura voice
SAKURAMOD-TELEMETRY_CONSENT.description: Sends completed Standard-mode Kinomoto Sakura run history, correlated card reward choices, aggregate card draw counts, an opaque run key, exact ascension/player count, SakuraMod version, and loaded gameplay Mod ids/versions for balance diagnostics. SakuraMod adds no card-play data, card text, local path, or personal identifier.
